project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite board game app
verification_instructions: Run 'npx vite build' from project root and confirm it builds successfully
environment_constraints: Pre-existing tsc -b errors in BattleBiddingOverlay.tsx and BattlePanel.tsx unrelated to our changes. Use 'npx vite build' for verification.
key_patterns: CSS is in src/App.css as a single minified file. Components use className-based styling. i18n in src/i18n/es.ts and en.ts. Icons use SVG components from ./Icons with a size prop.
directory_structure: src/ contains App.css (all styles), components/ (React components), i18n/ (en.ts, es.ts, index.ts), img/ (images), store/ (zustand), types/ (game types)
